user.title: Octopus EVSE IOG Manager — Global Settings

data.dry_run: Dry run mode (calculate only — do not write to Octopus)

data_description.registered_battery_kwh: The battery size Octopus has on record for your Intelligent Go tariff/EVSE. This is used as the reference for scaling charge targets when a different vehicle is plugged in. Check your Octopus account if unsure.
data_description.charging_loss_percent: Typical round-trip AC charging loss (default 10%). Used for informational energy sensors only — does not affect the charge target.
data_description.plug_stabilisation_delay: How long to wait after a vehicle is detected as plugged in before reading its SoC and setting the charge target. Increase this if your car integration is slow to report a fresh SoC after plug-in.
data_description.dry_run: When enabled, the integration calculates the correct target % and logs it, but does not write it to the Octopus Energy integration. Use this to validate the maths before going live.

data_description.vehicle_name: A friendly name for this vehicle (e.g. 'Ariya').
data_description.vehicle_battery_kwh: The usable (not gross) battery capacity in kWh. Check your vehicle manual.
data_description.vehicle_soc_sensor: Optional. A sensor reporting battery % (0–100), device_class: battery. Leave blank to enter SoC manually via a slider.
data_description.vehicle_plug_sensor: Optional. A binary_sensor/switch/input_boolean that is ON when plugged in. Leave blank to use the manual 'Plugged In' switch instead.

add_another.title: Add Another Vehicle?
add_another.description: You have added {count} vehicle(s). Add another?

abort.already_configured: Octopus EVSE IOG Manager is already configured. Use the Options flow to make changes.

data.dry_run: Dry run mode (calculate only — do not write to Octopus)

data_description.registered_battery_kwh: The battery size Octopus has on record for your Intelligent Go tariff/EVSE.

data.action: What would you like to do?

recalculate.name: Recalculate
recalculate.description: Force an immediate recalculation of the IOG charge target for all vehicles currently locked in (target already set), resetting them to the waiting state.
